description: Shared cognitive state schema. All skill schemas extend this base via allOf. Single source of truth per A-1. Aligned with canonical CognitiveState in runtime/schemas.py.

cognitive_state.description: AuDHD cognitive context from PROFILE.md and AGENT.md contracts. Parsed at runtime by runtime/cognitive.py.

energy_level.description: Operator energy per AGENT.md energy-adaptive routing. Controls model pool, max tier, output density.

attention_state.description: Monotropism signal. Focused = single-thread strict. Diffuse = broader context. Transitioning = announce shift.

session_context.description: Where Was I protocol. Controls session continuity behavior.

active_mode.description: PROFILE.md mode routing. Auto-inferred from input_text if not provided.

task_tier.description: AGENT.md complexity classification. Controls verification and model selection.

active_thread.description: Current monotropic focus thread. Agents must not open new threads without announcing.

context_switches.description: Topic switches in session. >2 triggers SK-PRIORITIZE monotropism guard.

request_id.description: Unique request identifier for tracing and resume context.

resume_from.description: Checkpoint ID to resume from. Only used when session_context is resumed or interrupted.

resume_context.description: Optional. State from previous execution for continuity.

skill_input.description: Skill-specific input. Schema defined per skill.

reasoning_mode.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning depth. 'none' = direct answer, 'lightweight' = observe-decide-act, 'standard' = decompose-reason-synthesize-verify, 'deep' = full hypothesis-evidence-synthesis. Auto-selected by SK-COT hook based on task_tier when hook is active.

retrieval_context.description: Retrieved documents for RAG. Each item has source, content, and optional relevance_score. Injected by SK-RAG hook.

skill_output.description: Skill-specific output. Must include cognitive_state echo.

cognitive_state_echo.description: Echo back cognitive_state for orchestrator continuity tracking.

next_action.description: Single highest-leverage next action. Always required.
